sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ السُّوقَ الشَّعْبِيَّ لِشِرَاءِ التَّوَابِلِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam narodnu pijacu kako bih kupio svježe začine.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the traditional market to buy fresh spices.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ مَلِيئًا بِالْأَلْوَانِ الْجَمِيلَةِ وَالرَّوَائِحِ الزَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila puna lijepih boja i ugodnih mirisa.
sentences.translationEn: The market was full of beautiful colors and pleasant scents.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْكَمُّونِ وَالْقِرْفَةِ لِاسْتِخْدَامِهِمَا فِي عَشَاءِ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam malo kima i cimeta da ih iskoristim u današnjoj večeri.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some cumin and cinnamon to use in today's dinner.
